text.content: Q1: Experience leading global GTM (100+ people)

I led Sales at Penbrothers, a B2B SaaS platform in the Philippines. When I joined, the sales operation was ad-hoc - no real process, no forecasting, CRM was a data graveyard. In 12 months, I: Rebuilt the entire outbound engine, designed territories from scratch, built a forecasting model that worked - 3x revenue growth. Also mentored 250+ startups through 500 Startups and Plug and Play. Every one struggled with pipeline mystery, CRM decay, and forecast fantasy. I've solved all three at scale.

Implemented HubSpot from ground up at Penbrothers. Built automated outbound sequences (3x industry average), created lead scoring models, set up pipeline automation, integrated with ZoomInfo/Apollo/Clearbit, enforced CRM hygiene. Philosophy: HubSpot is a mirror - if your data is messy, your decisions are bad.

Commit-Expected-Best model: Commit (100% confident), Expected (weighted by stage/history), Best (upside). Built in HubSpot with custom fields. Every week we knew exactly what we would close - not a range. Drove 3x growth at Penbrothers.
1) The problem is real - B2B payment fraud is a $5T problem. 2) The inflection point - going from regional to global is exactly the phase I thrive in. Based in Tokyo, time zones don't scare me.

=== WHAT WE'RE BUILDING ===
A HubSpot workflow that automatically routes new leads to the right regional sales team based on company location, and sets up personalized follow-up sequences that match each region's business hours.

=== WHY WE'RE BUILDING IT ===
When you have 3 regions (AU, US, EU), leads often get routed manually or randomly. This causes: slow response times (lead contacted during their night), leads contacted at wrong times, no regional customization. The result is lower conversion and wasted leads.

=== WHAT TO EXPECT ===
- Every new lead gets assigned to the right regional rep within seconds
- Follow-up emails send at appropriate local times (9am in Sydney, 9am in Dallas, 9am in Paris)
- No manual routing needed - the system does it automatically
- Consistent experience for leads across all regions

=== STEP-BY-STEP TUTORIAL ===

PREREQUISITES:
- HubSpot Professional or above (needed for workflows)
- Clearbit or ZoomInfo account (for company enrichment)
- At least 2 sales reps across different regions

STEP 1: Create region property in HubSpot
1. Go to Settings (gear icon) > Properties
2. Select Contacts > Click "Create property"
3. Property name: "Region"
4. Property type: Dropdown select
5. Add options: Australia, US, Europe, Other
6. Click Save

STEP 2: Set up Clearbit/ZoomInfo integration (if not done)
1. Go to Settings > Integrations > Marketplace
2. Search for Clearbit or ZoomInfo
3. Click "Install" and follow auth instructions
4. Make sure enrichment is enabled for contacts

STEP 3: Build the routing workflow
1. Go to Automation > Workflows
2. Click "Create workflow" > "From scratch"
3. Select "Contact-based"
4. Name it: "Lead Routing - By Region"

TRIGGER SETUP:
1. Click "Set trigger"
2. Search for "Form submission"
3. Select your main forms (contact form, demo request, etc.)
4. Or use "Contact property changes" > "Domain" > "is not empty"

ACTION 1 - Enrich company:
1. Click "+" > "Data enrichment"
2. Select Clearbit or ZoomInfo
3. Action: "Enrich company data"
4. Select properties to pull: company name, domain, employee count, industry, revenue

ACTION 2 - Set region property:
1. Click "+" > "Contact property"
2. Set "Region" to...
3. Click "+" to add branches
4. Branch 1: If company domain ends with ".au" > Set to "Australia"
5. Branch 2: If company domain ends with ".com" (US company) > Set to "US"
6. Branch 3: If company domain ends with ".co.uk" OR ".de" OR ".fr" > Set to "Europe"
7. Default: Set to "Other"

ACTION 3 - Assign owner:
1. Click "+" > "Contact owner"
2. Set owner based on region
3. Branch: If Region = Australia > Set owner to [AU Rep]
4. Branch: If Region = US > Set owner to [US Rep]
5. Branch: If Region = Europe > Set owner to [EU Rep]

ACTION 4 - Enroll in sequence:
1. Click "+" > "Sales email"
2. Select "Enroll in sequence"
3. Branch: If Region = Australia > Select "AU Follow-up Sequence"
4. Branch: If Region = US > Select "US Follow-up Sequence"
5. Branch: If Region = Europe > Select "EU Follow-up Sequence"

STEP 4: Create region-specific email sequences
1. Go to Sales > Sequences
2. Click "Create sequence"
3. Create 3 separate sequences:

AU SEQUENCE (send times 9am AEST):
- Email 1: Welcome (send immediately)
- Email 2: Follow up (delay 2 days, send 9am AEST)
- Email 3: Final check (delay 3 days, send 9am}
